rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the request instead of treating it as another copy change, explicitly recognizes the prior pattern of patch-like information overlays across touchpoints, and moves the owner upstream to information architecture/process guidance. It proposes consolidation into a single pre-visit/FAQ/process entry and sets a boundary against future homepage additions. Although it allows a temporary emergency notice, it does not accept the next overlay as the durable default, so the anti-spiral triage is satisfied.
